Name: Ferrari
1Q: In which city did Enzo Ferrari formed Scuderia Ferrari racing team, in 1929?
tip1: In 1943, the Ferrari factory moved to Maranello, where it has remained ever since.
2Q: What was the name of the first Ferrari for road use?
tip2: Enzo Ferrari started built and sold road automobiles to fund Scuderia Ferrari racing team.
3Q: Who is the Ferrari most successful driver in Formula 1 World Championship?
tip3: Michael Schumacher won 72 Formula 1 Grands Prix and 7 Drivers' Championships.
4Q: What is the name of Ferrari's private test track?
tip4: The Fiorano Circuit has 12 turns and length of 3km/1.9mi.
5Q: In which city is the Ferrari World theme park located?
tip5: There you can drive in world fastest rollercoaster, take 4D virtual journey of Ferrari history, and many more things to do.
6Q: What is the latest model whose development was overseen by Enzo Ferrari?
tip6: At the time, it was Ferrari's fastest, most powerful and most expensive car for sale, designed to celebrate Ferrari's 40th anniversary.
7Q: In how many units was the model Enzo produced?
tip7: It was developed in 2002 using plenty of Formula One technologies.
8Q: Which of the following models does not have a V12 engine configuration?
tip8: The Ferrari SF90 Stradale is the brand's first-ever plug-in hybrid, combining twin-turbocharged V8 with three electric motors.
9Q: What is Ferrari's first production four-wheel-drive model?
tip9: 4RM can be activated only in comfort or snow driving modes.
10Q: What was the price of the new LaFerrari, first hybrid Ferrari?
tip10: Since LaFerrari is a limited-production car, its value will grow over the years.
